commit.message:
Add .nojekyll, block .md files in .gitignore

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix+docs: pending changes guard for pagination, design docs, CLAUDE.md

Code fix:
- clutch--execute-page silently discarded pending changes via
  clutch--update-page-state without prompting. Add an explicit guard at
  the top of the function (inline, not via clutch--check-pending-changes,
  because we are already inside the result buffer and the message should
  say "change page" not "re-run query").

Design docs (doc/):
- 001-staged-commit-workflow.md: why delete/insert were unified under
  staged-commit, commit ordering rationale, state representation choices,
  known filter-interaction limitation
- 002-pending-changes-guard.md: why the guard lives in clutch--execute,
  why pagination needs its own guard, double-prompt avoidance
- 003-embark-table-integration.md: category metadata vs minibuffer target
  finder, C-c C-d fallback removal rationale, optional dependency design

CLAUDE.md:
- Add "Design Docs" section: when to read doc/, when and what to write,
  quality bar for decision records

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Mask 20 more unnecessary systemd units and bind-mount /proc during post-hook install

Mount /proc into the chroot before apt-get install so package
postinst scripts can call systemctl without "/proc/ is not mounted"
warnings. Unmount immediately after.

Mask 20 additional systemd units that serve no purpose in WSL:
hardware (ModemManager, wpa_supplicant, bolt, udisks2,
iio-sensor-proxy, tpm-udev, fwupd, secureboot-db), networking
(avahi-daemon), cloud-init, crash reporting (apport), and
enterprise management (landscape-client). Total masked: 29.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(graphdb): insert meta and user triples separately to avoid prefix collision

When store_event combined meta_turtle and event.triples before inserting,
user-defined prefixes (e.g. hilo: <http://hilo.semantics.io/>) could
overwrite the internal ontology prefix (hilo: <http://hilo.semantics.io/ontology/>),
causing events to be stored under the wrong type and never returned by get_events.

fix: Docker entrypoint starts Claude in wrong working directory (#292)

The tmux session was created with `cd $HOME` (/home/zylos) instead of
`cd $ZYLOS_DIR` (/home/zylos/zylos). This caused Claude Code to not
find the project CLAUDE.md, breaking features that depend on it
(e.g., onboarding instructions).

`zylos init` correctly uses `cd $ZYLOS_DIR` (init.js line 720), but
the Docker entrypoint had its own tmux launch with the wrong path.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: time slots not showing in booking wizard

handleSelectVehicle was dispatching SET_VEHICLE (step→2) then NEXT_STEP
(step→3), skipping ServiceStep entirely. Service was never selected so
totalDuration=0, causing the availability API to reject the request
(duration must be positive) and return no slots.

Remove the redundant NEXT_STEP dispatch — SET_VEHICLE already advances
to step 2 via Math.max(state.step, 2).

Also add debug log to availability.ts for production visibility.

commit.message:
Add Phase 1: Product Intelligence Database

Adds a self-improving product knowledge base to drive 95%+ recipe–deal
matching accuracy.

New files:
- backend/database/schema.sql — SQLite schema (products, aliases, match_history)
- backend/database/db.js — better-sqlite3 connection wrapper with CRUD helpers
- backend/services/productCategorizer.js — Claude Haiku categorization service
  (individual + batch), with keyword-based fallback for resilience
- backend/services/productLookup.js — 5-tier lookup (exact → alias → normalized
  → fuzzy/Levenshtein → barcode) with auto-alias creation on fuzzy matches
- backend/scripts/seedDatabase/seedOpenFoodFacts.js — seeds ~40K AU products
  from Open Food Facts JSON API (page-by-page, 500ms delay)
- backend/scripts/seedDatabase/seedWoolworths.js — seeds ~20K products via
  100 search terms against Woolworths API + Claude categorization
- backend/scripts/seedDatabase/seedColes.js — same for Coles API (~15K)
- backend/scripts/testProductLookup.js — hit-rate test against 42 sample deals
- backend/scripts/testCategorization.js — validates Claude categorization output

Updated:
- backend/services/dealService.js — enrichDealWithProduct() + enrichDealsWithProducts()
  integrate product intelligence into the deal refresh pipeline (Phase 3 background)
- .gitignore — products.db and OFF CSV excluded

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add AirPods Pro 3 heart rate monitor iOS app

- SwiftUI app reading live heart rate from HealthKit
- Fix: always call startMonitoring() after authorization — HealthKit
  read-only types always return .notDetermined from authorizationStatus(for:)
  so gating on that status silently prevented monitoring from starting
- HKAnchoredObjectQuery with updateHandler for real-time updates
- Prefers AirPods Pro source, falls back to most recent sample
- Pulsing heart animation synced to measured BPM

Document symlink trick for whole-directory rw mounts

Directories with children in home_rw/ are mounted entry-by-entry,
causing new files (e.g. gh hosts.yml) to be lost on exit. Document
the workaround: symlink to an external directory so it mounts as
a single unit. Update setup example for .ssh and .config/gh.

commit.message:
Upload resolved 3rd-party images to backend for caching

When the frontend resolves fallback images from ARASAAC/OpenSymbols APIs,
upload the resolved PNG to the backend's cloud storage so future sessions
can use the cached image directly instead of repeating expensive API calls.

- Add uploadPictureFile multipart upload method to NetworkService
- Add maybeUploadImage to ImageLocatorService with auth guard, per-session
  dedup, 512KB size limit, destroy safety, and fire-and-forget error handling
- Switch option.gts to use getPictureForWordAsDataURL to route through
  canvas pipeline that triggers the upload
- Add MSW handler for POST /api/cloud/upload/picture
- Add 7 unit tests covering upload logic guards and edge cases

commit.message:
fix: supply chain tab — use industry-level screener queries instead of peer classification

The previous approach classified stock-peers (all same industry) as suppliers/customers
using heuristics, which always resulted in 0 suppliers and 0 customers. Now queries FMP
screener for companies in related industries using a comprehensive supply chain map
covering 65+ industries across all GICS sectors, with sector-level fallback.

Add hooks, submodule management, CLI tools, scan, and rename binary to crk

- Add git post-commit hook for automatic PRD detection with agent commit
  safety (RUSTY_REFINERY_SKIP_HOOK=1 on spawned processes)
- Add submodule discovery from parent repo .gitmodules (first-level only)
- Add submodule create/list commands with configurable repos_path,
  submodules_path, and optional github_account remote
- Add tools subcommand mirroring MCP tools for direct CLI invocation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix boiler not turning off at peak in summer mode (v1.0.36)

The peak tariff turn-off had a `hour > deadline` guard that prevented
the boiler from turning off between 07:00-08:00 in summer (deadline=8).
Peak starts at 07:00 on weekdays — boiler should turn off immediately
when peak starts, regardless of the heating deadline.

Removed the deadline guard from the peak tariff block. The deadline
is only relevant for scheduling when to heat, not for blocking peak
turn-off.

commit.message:
Add v2 intent-matching pipeline, robust error handling, and production README

- Add v2 pipeline: 4-verdict taxonomy (EXCESS_PATCH, EXCESS_TEST,
  VAGUE_SPEC, CLEAN) with per-hunk and per-assertion granularity
- Add intent extraction from problem statements with acceptance criteria
- Add structural diff analysis (AST-level function/class change detection)
- Add per-assertion ON_TOPIC/OFF_TOPIC classification for F2P tests
- Fix LLM error handling: fail loud instead of silent fallbacks
  - Disable OpenAI SDK built-in retries (prevent dual-layer retry storms)
  - Add exponential backoff with 60s cap (7 attempts, 5s base delay)
  - Raise RuntimeError on exhausted retries instead of returning empty
  - Surface pipeline errors as SEVERE reports (not hidden as CLEAN)
- Add unit tests for v1 and v2 scoring logic
- Rewrite README with full architecture docs and error handling section

Fix session save blocked by premature duplicate-prevention guard

The lastSavedSessionKeyRef was being set before saveSessionWithDuration
was called, causing the guard check to immediately bail out and never
actually insert the session into the database.

commit.message:
Use remotes.d config files instead of flatpak CLI in chroot

flatpak remote-add needs /proc mounted, which isn't available in the
chroot after lb chroot completes. Drop .flatpakrepo files into
/etc/flatpak/remotes.d/ instead — the standard way to pre-configure
remotes in distro images, with no chroot execution needed.

for ultrawides. Add overflow-x-hidden on body to prevent horizontal
scrollbar from 100vw including scrollbar width.

commit.message:
Fix SSL no-verify: pass function pointer, not pointer-to-pointer

LDAP_OPT_SERVER_CERTIFICATE requires the function pointer itself
as invalue. Passing (void*)&fn gave Schannel the address of a local
stack variable (i.e. a pointer-to-pointer), so the callback was never
registered and Schannel's default chain verification ran — rejecting
self-signed certificates.

Fix: (void*)&fn → (void*)fn

Also add explicit ldap_connect() before ldap_simple_bind_sW() so the
SSL handshake occurs after all options (including the cert callback)
are set, rather than lazily at bind time.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
